ddls:
CREATE TABLE "public_toilets" (
  "toilet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public toilet */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the managing organization */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label of the managing organization */,
  "service_type_uri" TEXT /* URI of the service type */,
  "service_type_label" TEXT /* Label of the service type */,
  "location_text" TEXT /* Text description of the toilet location */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the toilet */,
  "locality_address" TEXT /* Locality address of the toilet */,
  "town_address" TEXT /* Town address of the toilet */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the toilet */,
  "geo_area_ward_uri" TEXT /* URI of the geographical area ward */,
  "geo_area_ward_label" TEXT /* Label of the geographical area ward */,
  "uprn" TEXT /* Unique Property Reference Number (UPRN) */,
  "coordinate_reference_system" TEXT /* Coordinate reference system used */,
  "geo_x" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the toilet */,
  "geo_y" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the toilet */,
  "geo_easting" INTEGER /* Easting coordinate of the toilet */,
  "geo_northing" INTEGER /* Northing coordinate of the toilet */,
  "geo_point_licensing_url" TEXT /* URL for the licensing of geographical points */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the toilet (e.g., Female and male) */,
  "accessible_category" TEXT /* Accessible category (e.g., Female and male) */,
  "baby_change" INTEGER /* Availability of baby-changing facilities */,
  "secure_disposal_of_sharps" INTEGER /* Availability of secure disposal of sharps */,
  "opening_hours_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opening hours */,
  "managing_by" TEXT /* Managing authority or service provider */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charge */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "extract_date" TEXT /* Date the data was extracted */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is made available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toilet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_toilets_organisation_uri FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_uri") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_toilets_service_type_uri FOREIGN KEY ("service_type_uri") REFERENCES service_types ("service_type_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_toilets_geo_area_ward_uri FOREIGN KEY ("geo_area_ward_uri") REFERENCES geo_areas ("geo_area_ward_uri"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_toilets_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_toilets_managing_by FOREIGN KEY ("managing_by") REFERENCES managing_organizations ("service_provider"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_toilets_opening_hours_id FOREIGN KEY ("opening_hours_id") REFERENCES opening_hours ("opening_hours_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI of the organization */,
  "organisation_label" TEXT /* Label of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_types" (
  "service_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "service_type_uri" TEXT /* URI of the service type */,
  "service_type_label" TEXT /* Label of the service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_areas" (
  "geo_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical area */,
  "geo_area_ward_uri" TEXT /* URI of the geographical area ward */,
  "geo_area_ward_label" TEXT /* Label of the geographical area ward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accessibility" (
  "accessibility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accessibility feature set */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the toilet (e.g., Female and male) */,
  "accessible_category" TEXT /* Accessible category (e.g., Female and male) */,
  "baby_change" INTEGER /* Availability of baby-changing facilities */,
  "secure_disposal_of_sharps" INTEGER /* Availability of secure disposal of sharps */,
  "wheelchair_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the toilet is wheelchair accessible */,
  "step_free_access" INTEGER /* Whether the toilet has step-free access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessibility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opening_hours" (
  "opening_hours_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opening hours set */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the toilet */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the toilet */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week when the toilet is open */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opening_hours_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "charge_amount" REAL /* Amount charged for using the toilet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* Accepted payment methods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managing_organizations" (
  "managing_org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each managing organization entry */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the managing organization */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "maintenance_contractor" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance contractor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("managing_org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "toilet_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility entry */,
  "toilet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public toilet */,
  "number_of_cubicles" INTEGER /* Number of cubicles in the toilet */,
  "number_of_sinks" INTEGER /* Number of sinks in the toilet */,
  "disabled_access" INTEGER /* Whether the toilet has disabled access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_toilet_facilities_toilet_id FOREIGN KEY ("toilet_id") REFERENCES public_toilets ("toilet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "toilet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public toilet */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled maintenance */,
  "schedule_time" TEXT /* Time of the scheduled maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_toilet_id FOREIGN KEY ("toilet_id") REFERENCES public_toilets ("toilet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "toilet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public toilet */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_time" TEXT /* Time of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_history_toilet_id FOREIGN KEY ("toilet_id") REFERENCES public_toilets ("toilet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "toilet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the public toilet */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Time of the feedback */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_toilet_id FOREIGN KEY ("toilet_id") REFERENCES public_toilets ("toilet_id")
)
